RuleSet.Name: src/schemaprot/ISchemaProtTable.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 protected interface for a $TableName$ record implementation

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaProtTableJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot

RuleSet.GenRule: $switch RelationType Superclass empty Components empty Children empty default attemptDeclProtISchemaTableRelationSetter$

public void set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$(I$reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference ToTable TableName$ argObj); public void set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$($iterate Columns(first declProtSetArgColumn each declProtCommaSetArgColumn)$);
public $implProtJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implProtJavaAtomType$ $lower implProtColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $implProtJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $implJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
$switch HasSuperClassRelation no maybeDeclProtRecOptAuditColumnAttrAccessors default empty$$iterate Columns( each maybeDeclProtSchemaRecTableRecDataColumn )$
$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone IsNullable first IsNullable each empty empty no )$
public $declJavaAtomType$ get$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $declJavaAtomType$ $lower declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $declJavaAtomType$ get$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $declJavaAtomType$ $lower declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $declJavaAtomType$ get$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $declJavaAtomType$ $lower declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
$switch HasAuditColumns yes declProtAuditColumnInitValues default empty$$iterate Columns( each maybeDeclProtInitValue empty empty )$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef empty BoolDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified EnumDef declProtInitValue Id16Gen declProtInitValue Id32Gen declProtInitValue Id64Gen declProtInitValue Int16Def declProtInitValue Int32Def declProtInitValue Int64Def declProtInitValue UInt16Def declProtInitValue UInt32Def declProtInitValue UInt64Def declProtInitValue FloatDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified DoubleDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified NumberDef declProtInitValue DateDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified TimeDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified TimestampDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified TZDateDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified TZTimeDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified TZTimestampDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash128Gen declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash160Gen declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash224Gen declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash256Gen declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash384Gen declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash512Gen declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash128Def declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash160Def declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash224Def declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash256Def declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash384Def declProtInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash512Def declProtInitValueIfSpecified Uuid6Gen declProtInitValueIfSpecified Uuid6Def declProtInitValueIfSpecified UuidGen declProtInitValueIfSpecified UuidDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified StringDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified TokenDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified NmTokenDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified NmTokensDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified TextDef declProtInitValueIfSpecified default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef empty BoolDef empty EnumDef declProtMinValue Id16Gen declProtMinValueIfSpecified Id32Gen declProtMinValueIfSpecified Id64Gen declProtMinValueIfSpecified Int16Def declProtMinValueIfSpecified Int32Def declProtMinValueIfSpecified Int64Def declProtMinValueIfSpecified UInt16Def declProtMinValueIfSpecified UInt32Def declProtMinValueIfSpecified UInt64Def declProtMinValueIfSpecified FloatDef declProtMinValueIfSpecified DoubleDef declProtMinValueIfSpecified NumberDef declProtMinValueIfSpecified DateDef empty TimeDef empty TimestampDef empty TZDateDef empty TZTimeDef empty TZTimestampDef empty DbKeyHash128Gen empty DbKeyHash160Gen empty DbKeyHash224Gen empty DbKeyHash256Gen empty DbKeyHash384Gen empty DbKeyHash512Gen empty DbKeyHash128Def empty DbKeyHash160Def empty DbKeyHash224Def empty DbKeyHash256Def empty DbKeyHash384Def empty DbKeyHash512Def empty Uuid6Gen empty Uuid6Def empty UuidGen empty UuidDef empty StringDef empty TokenDef empty NmTokenDef empty NmTokensDef empty TextDef empty default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef empty BoolDef empty EnumDef declProtMaxValue Id16Gen declProtMaxValueIfSpecified Id32Gen declProtMaxValueIfSpecified Id64Gen declProtMaxValueIfSpecified Int16Def declProtMaxValueIfSpecified Int32Def declProtMaxValueIfSpecified Int64Def declProtMaxValueIfSpecified UInt16Def declProtMaxValueIfSpecified UInt32Def declProtMaxValueIfSpecified UInt64Def declProtMaxValueIfSpecified FloatDef declProtMaxValueIfSpecified DoubleDef declProtMaxValueIfSpecified NumberDef declProtMaxValueIfSpecified DateDef empty TimeDef empty TimestampDef empty TZDateDef empty TZTimeDef empty TZTimestampDef empty DbKeyHash128Gen empty DbKeyHash160Gen empty DbKeyHash224Gen empty DbKeyHash256Gen empty DbKeyHash384Gen empty DbKeyHash512Gen empty DbKeyHash128Def empty DbKeyHash160Def empty DbKeyHash224Def empty DbKeyHash256Def empty DbKeyHash384Def empty DbKeyHash512Def empty Uuid6Gen empty Uuid6Def empty UuidGen empty UuidDef empty StringDef empty TokenDef empty NmTokenDef empty NmTokensDef empty TextDef empty default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$
public final static int CLASS_CODE = 0x$ClassCode$; public final static String S_CLASS_CODE = "$ClassCode$";
extends I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$
//@Override not necessary because interfaces aren't able to implement Comparable, but they can double-team on the requirement public int compareTo( Object obj );
public void set( I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Prot$reference BaseClass TableName$ src ); public void setProt$TableName$( I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ src );$declProtRecSetHistory$
public void set( I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Prot$reference BaseClass TableName$H src ); public void setProt$TableName$( I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$H src );
